falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above its 52-week high by at least 10%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above key resistance would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal, indicating a confirmed bullish trend rather than an unknown phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 200% of the 30-day average volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Abnormally high volume would indicate strong market participation and trend confirmation, contradicting the 'UNKNOWN' verdict's ambiguity.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff score would indicate extreme volatility or momentum, directly contradicting the current 'HOLD' signal and suggesting a clear market direction.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
